agent.name: performance-cost-auditor
agent.role: Assess bundle tracing, query patterns, and build-time costs from preflight and next.config import graph.

findings.title: Turbopack NFT warnings: onboarding cluster route still pulls next.config → snapshot fs trace
findings.description: Production build succeeds but repeats NFT warnings: import trace next.config.ts → lib/onboarding-cluster-snapshot.ts → onboarding cluster route. Same class of issue as prior perf finding; may enlarge traced server chunks. Consider turbopackIgnore-scoped paths or narrowing snapshot imports per build log hints.

proof_hooks.summary: audits/artifacts/_run_/build.txt lines 11–48 — two unexpected file in NFT list warnings with cluster route trace

history.notes: Reconfirmed from preflight build.txt; snapshot module name matches current tree.

next_actions.action: Apply outputFileTracingRoot / turbopackIgnore comments from Next 16 docs for fs-heavy snapshot modules.
next_actions.rationale: Reduces server bundle trace and cold-start cost.
